mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, nickname, avatar, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, 1, now(), now());
mapper.select: select id, username, password, nickname, avatar, status, create_time, update_time from user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password, nickname, avatar, status, create_time, update_time from user where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update user set avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
